## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Dependencies

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `pnpm lint` + `pnpm tsc -b --noEmit` pass (for frontend changes)
- [ ] `go test -race ./engine/...` + `go vet ./...` pass (for engine changes)
- [ ] `helm lint helm/kubeislands/` passes (for chart changes)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Screenshots included (for UI changes)
- [ ] DCO sign-off: all commits have `Signed-off-by:` (`git commit -s`)

Closes #
